memberdef.definition: int(* wifi_mgmt_ops::scan) (const struct device *dev, struct wifi_scan_params *params, scan_result_cb_t cb)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, struct wifi_scan_params *params, scan_result_cb_t cb)
memberdef.name: scan

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.
Scan parameters
Callback to be called for each result cb parameter is the cb that should be called for each result by the driver. The wifi mgmt part will take care of raising the necessary event etc.

simplesect.para: true if support, false if not support

memberdef.name: legacy_roam

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance.

memberdef.definition: int(* wifi_mgmt_ops::get_version) (const struct device *dev, struct wifi_version *params)
memberdef.name: get_version

briefdescription.para: Get Version of WiFi driver and Firmware.

detaileddescription.para: The driver that implements the get_version function must not use stack to allocate the version information pointers that are returned as params struct members. The version pointer parameters should point to a static memory either in ROM (preferred) or in RAM.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance
Version parameters

memberdef.definition: int(* wifi_mgmt_ops::get_conn_params) (const struct device *dev, struct wifi_connect_req_params *params)
memberdef.name: get_conn_params

briefdescription.para: Get Wi-Fi connection parameters recently used.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the driver instance
the Wi-Fi connection parameters recently used
